requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (UNBS PVoC + IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（UNBS PVoC + IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（UNBS PVoC + IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Uganda fall under the UNBS (Uganda National Bureau of Standards) mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme for regulated products. General luminaire safety is assessed against IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which UNBS adopts as a Uganda Standard (US series); Uganda follows the IEC/US-adoption route rather than the EU EN harmonised-standard route. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation, creepage and clearance distances, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals — and the product must be rated for the Uganda 240 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid. Each regulated consignment must obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from a UNBS-appointed PVoC inspection body before shipment, via Route A (consignment-by-consignment testing), Route B (product registration) or Route C (licensing of frequent exporters). On arrival via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam, goods without a valid CoC can be detained, fined, or re-exported; an in-country importer of record handles clearance and the UNBS Q-Mark / import inspection where applicable.
summary.zh: 进口至乌干达的 LED 灯具受 UNBS（乌干达国家标准局）针对受管制产品的强制性出口前符合性验证（PVoC）方案管辖。通用灯具安全依据 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）评估，UNBS 将其采用为乌干达标准（US 系列）；乌干达采用 IEC/美标采纳路径，而非欧盟 EN 协调标准路径。核心要求涵盖防触电、绝缘、爬电距离和电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子——且产品须适配乌干达 240 V / 50 Hz 单相电网。每批受管制货物在出货前须经 UNBS 指定 PVoC 检验机构取得符合性证书（CoC），途径包括路径 A（逐批检测）、路径 B（产品注册）或路径 C（常出口商许可）。货物经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆到港时，无有效 CoC 者可能被扣留、罚款或退运；境内进口商负责清关并在适用时办理 UNBS Q 标志/进口检验。
summary.zht: 進口至烏干達的 LED 燈具受 UNBS（烏干達國家標準局）針對受管制產品的強制性出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）方案管轄。通用燈具安全依據 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）評估，UNBS 將其採用為烏干達標準（US 系列）；烏干達採用 IEC/美標採納路徑，而非歐盟 EN 協調標準路徑。核心要求涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、爬電距離和電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子——且產品須適配烏干達 240 V / 50 Hz 單相電網。每批受管制貨物在出貨前須經 UNBS 指定 PVoC 檢驗機構取得符合性證書（CoC），途徑包括路徑 A（逐批檢測）、路徑 B（產品注冊）或路徑 C（常出口商許可）。貨物經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆到港時，無有效 CoC 者可能被扣留、罰款或退運；境內進口商負責清關並在適用時辦理 UNBS Q 標誌/進口檢驗。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — mandatory for regulated imports (Uganda National Bureau of Standards)
IEC 60598-1 (adopted as Uganda Standard) — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests
UNBS Import Inspection and Clearance / Q-Mark scheme

summary.en: China's general luminaire safety standard is GB 7000.1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests, with GB/T 7000.1-2023 replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026), the China adoption of IEC 60598-1. In-scope residential luminaires require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories (e.g., CQC). CCC certification and Chinese test reports are not, on their own, accepted under the UNBS PVoC pathway — a separate CoC must be obtained per consignment or via registration/licensing.
summary.zh: 中国通用灯具安全标准为 GB 7000.1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验，GB/T 7000.1-2023 自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015），系 IEC 60598-1 的中国采用版。范围内居民灯具须取得由 CNCA 管理的 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），并由 CNCA 授权实验室（如 CQC）检测。CCC 认证及中国检测报告本身不被 UNBS PVoC 路径接受——须按批次或通过注册/许可另行取得 CoC。
summary.zht: 中國通用燈具安全標準為 GB 7000.1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗，GB/T 7000.1-2023 自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015），系 IEC 60598-1 的中國採用版。範圍內居民燈具須取得由 CNCA 管理的 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），並由 CNCA 授權實驗室（如 CQC）檢測。CCC 認證及中國檢測報告本身不被 UNBS PVoC 路徑接受——須按批次或通過注冊/許可另行取得 CoC。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (China adoption of IEC 60598-1)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both Uganda (IEC 60598-1 adopted as US) and China (GB 7000.1) share the IEC 60598-1 technical base, so the underlying safety construction requirements are broadly aligned. The main differences are procedural and electrical: (1) Uganda requires a per-consignment Certificate of Conformity under the UNBS PVoC programme — a CCC certificate does not substitute, and goods can be detained at Mombasa/Dar es Salaam without a valid CoC; (2) the product must be rated and tested for 240 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V), so voltage/insulation ratings and markings should reflect 240 V; (3) testing should be done by a laboratory accepted by the appointed PVoC body (ILAC MRA recognition is generally expected); (4) an in-country importer of record is needed for clearance. Use the PVoC Route A/B/C that best fits shipment frequency to minimise repeat testing.
gap.zh: 乌干达（采用 IEC 60598-1 为 US）与中国（GB 7000.1）共享 IEC 60598-1 技术基础，底层安全结构要求基本一致。主要差异为程序性与电气性：（1）乌干达要求在 UNBS PVoC 方案下逐批取得符合性证书——CCC 证书不可替代，无有效 CoC 货物可能在蒙巴萨/达累斯萨拉姆被扣留；（2）产品须按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定和检测（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220 V），故电压/绝缘评级及标识应体现 240 V；（3）检测应由指定 PVoC 机构接受的实验室进行（通常预期具 ILAC MRA 认可）；（4）清关需要境内进口商。应根据发货频率选择最合适的 PVoC 路径 A/B/C 以减少重复检测。
gap.zht: 烏干達（採用 IEC 60598-1 為 US）與中國（GB 7000.1）共享 IEC 60598-1 技術基礎，底層安全結構要求基本一致。主要差異為程序性與電氣性：（1）烏干達要求在 UNBS PVoC 方案下逐批取得符合性證書——CCC 證書不可替代，無有效 CoC 貨物可能在蒙巴薩/達累斯薩拉姆被扣留；（2）產品須按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定和檢測（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V），故電壓/絕緣評級及標識應體現 240 V；（3）檢測應由指定 PVoC 機構接受的實驗室進行（通常預期具 ILAC MRA 認可）；（4）清關需要境內進口商。應根據發貨頻率選擇最合適的 PVoC 路徑 A/B/C 以減少重複檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity required per regulated consignment before shipment; IEC 60598-1 (adopted as Uganda Standard) is the applicable safety basis; product must be rated 240 V / 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1-2023 is the applicable safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Uganda require a UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity, with safety assessed against IEC 60598-1 (adopted as a Uganda Standard) and the product rated for 240 V / 50 Hz. Chinese CCC certification and GB 7000.1 test reports do not by themselves satisfy the PVoC pathway. Because both regimes derive from IEC 60598-1, the construction requirements are broadly aligned, but a per-consignment CoC (or Route B/C registration/licensing), a laboratory accepted by the appointed PVoC body, and an in-country importer of record are required. Goods without a valid CoC can be detained or fined at Mombasa / Dar es Salaam.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入乌干达的 LED 灯具须取得 UNBS PVoC 符合性证书，安全依据 IEC 60598-1（采用为乌干达标准）评估，产品须按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 7000.1 检测报告本身不满足 PVoC 路径。由于两套制度均源自 IEC 60598-1，结构要求基本一致，但须取得逐批 CoC（或路径 B/C 注册/许可）、由指定 PVoC 机构接受的实验室检测，并设境内进口商。无有效 CoC 货物可能在蒙巴萨/达累斯萨拉姆被扣留或罚款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入烏干達的 LED 燈具須取得 UNBS PVoC 符合性證書，安全依據 IEC 60598-1（採用為烏干達標準）評估，產品須按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 7000.1 檢測報告本身不滿足 PVoC 路徑。由於兩套制度均源自 IEC 60598-1，結構要求基本一致，但須取得逐批 CoC（或路徑 B/C 注冊/許可）、由指定 PVoC 機構接受的實驗室檢測，並設境內進口商。無有效 CoC 貨物可能在蒙巴薩/達累斯薩拉姆被扣留或罰款。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamps & LED Driver Safety (IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯及 LED 驱动器安全（IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈及 LED 驅動器安全（IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting imported into Uganda are assessed against IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — safety specifications) adopted as a Uganda Standard, while LED drivers / control gear are assessed against IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules). These are part of the UNBS PVoC regulated-product assessment alongside IEC 60598-1 for the luminaire. Lamps and drivers must be rated for 240 V / 50 Hz operation, and a Certificate of Conformity must be issued per consignment (or covered by Route B/C registration/licensing) before shipment. Where a driver is shipped as a separate component, it is assessed on its own merits within the PVoC scope.
summary.zh: 进口至乌干达的通用照明自镇流 LED 灯依据采用为乌干达标准的 IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评估，LED 驱动器/控制装置则依据 IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）评估。这些与灯具的 IEC 60598-1 一并属于 UNBS PVoC 受管制产品评估的组成部分。灯与驱动器须按 240 V / 50 Hz 运行评定，且须在出货前逐批签发符合性证书（或通过路径 B/C 注册/许可覆盖）。当驱动器作为独立部件发运时，在 PVoC 范围内按其自身评估。
summary.zht: 進口至烏干達的通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈依據採用為烏干達標準的 IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評估，LED 驅動器/控制裝置則依據 IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）評估。這些與燈具的 IEC 60598-1 一併屬於 UNBS PVoC 受管制產品評估的組成部分。燈與驅動器須按 240 V / 50 Hz 運行評定，且須在出貨前逐批簽發符合性證書（或通過路徑 B/C 注冊/許可覆蓋）。當驅動器作為獨立部件發運時，在 PVoC 範圍內按其自身評估。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62560 (adopted as Uganda Standard) — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications
IEC 61347-2-13 (adopted as Uganda Standard) — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements, China adoption of IEC 62560) and GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13). CCC certification may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market, tested by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Chinese CCC reports under GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 are not accepted on their own under the UNBS PVoC pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求，IEC 62560 的中国采用版）及 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求，与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐）。在中国居民市场，自镇流 LED 灯及特定功率范围的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 报告本身不被 UNBS PVoC 路径接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求，IEC 62560 的中國採用版）及 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求，與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊）。在中國居民市場，自鎮流 LED 燈及特定功率範圍的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 報告本身不被 UNBS PVoC 路徑接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements (China adoption of IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules

gap.en: Uganda (IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 adopted as US) and China (GB 24906 / GB 19510.14) share the same IEC technical base, so lamp and driver construction requirements are largely harmonized. The gaps are procedural and electrical: (1) Uganda requires a UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment — a CCC certificate does not substitute; (2) lamps and drivers must be rated/marked for 240 V / 50 Hz (nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V); (3) testing must be by a laboratory accepted by the appointed PVoC body; (4) a separately shipped driver is assessed on its own within the PVoC scope, so its markings and ratings should reflect 240 V. Existing Chinese test reports can reduce technical re-work given the shared IEC base, but cannot be reused directly to issue a Uganda CoC.
gap.zh: 乌干达（采用 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 为 US）与中国（GB 24906 / GB 19510.14）共享相同 IEC 技术基础，故灯与驱动器结构要求基本协调。差距为程序性与电气性：（1）乌干达要求逐批取得 UNBS PVoC 符合性证书——CCC 证书不可替代；（2）灯与驱动器须按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定/标识（标称电压不同于中国的 220 V）；（3）检测须由指定 PVoC 机构接受的实验室进行；（4）独立发运的驱动器在 PVoC 范围内按其自身评估，故其标识与评级应体现 240 V。鉴于共享 IEC 基础，现有中国检测报告可减少技术重复工作，但不可直接复用以签发乌干达 CoC。
gap.zht: 烏干達（採用 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 為 US）與中國（GB 24906 / GB 19510.14）共享相同 IEC 技術基礎，故燈與驅動器結構要求基本協調。差距為程序性與電氣性：（1）烏干達要求逐批取得 UNBS PVoC 符合性證書——CCC 證書不可替代；（2）燈與驅動器須按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定/標識（標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V）；（3）檢測須由指定 PVoC 機構接受的實驗室進行；（4）獨立發運的驅動器在 PVoC 範圍內按其自身評估，故其標識與評級應體現 240 V。鑑於共享 IEC 基礎，現有中國檢測報告可減少技術重複工作，但不可直接複用以簽發烏干達 CoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamps (IEC 62560) and LED drivers (IEC 61347-2-13) within the UNBS PVoC regulated scope require a Certificate of Conformity per consignment; product rated 240 V / 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — CCC may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps (GB 24906) and for LED drivers in certain power ranges (GB 19510.14-2014)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps (IEC 62560) and LED drivers (IEC 61347-2-13), adopted as Uganda Standards, are assessed within the UNBS PVoC programme and require a Certificate of Conformity per consignment, with 240 V / 50 Hz ratings. Chinese GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 CCC certification does not by itself satisfy the PVoC pathway, though the shared IEC technical base means existing reports can reduce re-testing effort. A driver shipped separately is assessed on its own merits and must be marked for 240 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 采用为乌干达标准的自镇流 LED 灯（IEC 62560）及 LED 驱动器（IEC 61347-2-13）在 UNBS PVoC 方案内评估，须逐批取得符合性证书，并按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定。中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 CCC 认证本身不满足 PVoC 路径，但共享 IEC 技术基础意味着现有报告可减少重新检测工作量。独立发运的驱动器按其自身评估，须标识 240 V。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 採用為烏干達標準的自鎮流 LED 燈（IEC 62560）及 LED 驅動器（IEC 61347-2-13）在 UNBS PVoC 方案內評估，須逐批取得符合性證書，並按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定。中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 CCC 認證本身不滿足 PVoC 路徑，但共享 IEC 技術基礎意味著現有報告可減少重新檢測工作量。獨立發運的驅動器按其自身評估，須標識 240 V。
